song.title: Be Thou My Vision
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Be Thou my Vision, O Lord of my heart; Naught be all else to me, Save that Thou art. Thou my best Thought by day or by night, Waking or sleeping, Thy presence my light.
[V2] 2) Be Thou my Wisdom, And Thou my true Word; I ever with you and you with me, Lord; Thou my great Father and I Thy true son, Thou in me dwelling, and I with Thee one.
[V3] 3) Be Thou my battle Shield, Sword for the fight; Be Thou my Dignity, Thou my Delight; Thou my soul’s shelter, Thou my high tower; Raise Thou me heav’enward, O pow’r of my pow’r.
[V4] 4) Riches I heed not, Nor man’s empty praise; Thou mine Inheritance, Now and always; Thou and Thou only first in my heart, High King of heaven, my treasure Thou art.
[V5] 5) High King of heaven, My victory won, May I reach heaven’s joys, O bright heav’n’s Sun! Heart of my own heart, Whatever befall, Still be my Vision, O Ruler of all.
song.author: Dallon Forgaill
